scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @payflow/shared && npm run build --workspace @payflow/api && npm run build --workspace @payflow/web
scripts.db:generate: node -e "console.log('Local file database is initialized automatically on first API start.')"
scripts.db:push: node -e "console.log('No schema push needed. Local file database is initialized automatically.')"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @payflow/api && npm run lint --workspace @payflow/web
